title: tabebuia ochracea subsp. neochrysantha
intro: Tabebuia ochracea subsp. neochrysantha, also known as the Yellow Trumpetbush, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Tabebuia ochracea subsp. neochrysantha is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts have been used in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
